title: Sour Crispy Canadian Beef Kidney Stir-fry
description: This dish is a one-pot gluten-free-friendly meal that combines tender beef kidneys with crispy textures and tangy flavors, perfect for those who enjoy savory and slightly spicy dishes.

ingredients.name: Ginger
ingredients.notes: Chopped finely to add depth of flavor.

ingredients.name: Red Chili Flakes
ingredients.notes: For a spicy kick, adjust to taste.

ingredients.name: Sour Sauce (like tamarind paste or vinegar)
Water
ingredients.notes: Mix with cornstarch to create a glaze for beef kidneys.

ingredients.name: Peanuts (optional)
ingredients.notes: For added crunch and umami flavor.

ingredients.name: Green Onions (for garnish)
ingredients.notes: Finely chopped to enhance the dish's visual appeal and add freshness.

instructions: Heat sesame oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and finely chopped ginger, stir-fry for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add beef kidneys, chili flakes, and sour sauce, toss to coat evenly. Cover with a lid if your pan doesn't have one, or use a plate on top to keep the heat in.

Stir in water with cornstarch mixture to create a glaze for the beef kidneys. Stir gently until it thickens slightly, ensuring that the kidney pieces are coated and the sauce is smooth but not too runny.
Turn off heat once done according to safe cooking times. Serve hot garnished with chopped green onions if desired.
Optionally, sprinkle peanuts over the top for extra crunch before serving.
